title: Language Teaching Application and Research Center - Application & Registration
content:
Language Teaching Application and Research Center - Application & Registration

Foreign students wishing to register for the Turkish Education Program at İESÜ-DOUAM must come to our Center, fill out the Application Registration Form, then pay the fee for the selected course or course package into İESÜ-DOUAM’s bank account. After submitting the payment receipt to the Center, they receive a copy of the contract. From the moment the payment is made, the student starts the education on the nearest predetermined date. The course fees at İESÜ-DOUAM are fixed and discounts are only applied based on decisions made.

Students who are granted the right to final registration by İESÜ-DOUAM and have completed the payment for the education program have the right to submit a written request to İESÜ-DOUAM up to 2 weeks before the program start date, stating that they will not attend the program. Participants who fail to provide written notice at least 2 weeks in advance will not receive any refund regardless of the reason for non-attendance.

At TÖMER, courses continue throughout the year, 7 days a week, from 09:00 to 21:00, except on official and religious holidays. Course hours canceled due to reasons originating from TÖMER will be compensated.

Turkish Course Registration Form (TR-ING)

This content was updated on 03/04/2026.
